text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I lost... again... I'm sorry... I'm so sorry...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I... let you down again, Big Brother...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I... let you down again, Big Sister...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Well, this is the last time... I definitely won't lose
my next race!
choice_data_list:
Hold on, we should think things through
carefully.

text_block_list.text: B-but if I lose again, I...

just a race.

text_block_list.text:
Yeah, okay... I still want to win next time though,
so please help me prepare.
